title: RAG Basics Notes
content: RAG stands for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. It improves chatbot answers by retrieving relevant information from a knowledge source before generating a final response.

title: RAG Basics Notes
content: The basic flow is: user asks a question, the system searches the knowledge base, retrieves the best chunks, adds them to the prompt, and then the model answers using that context. Chunking means splitting large documents into smaller pieces so retrieval becomes easier and more accurate.

title: RAG Basics Notes
content: A beginner RAG system can work without embeddings or a vector database by using keyword-based retrieval over local files. If no relevant context is found, the system can fall back to normal generation.
